title: Lucid Announces Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: Lucid announced Q2 2025 financial results showing continued production ramp but persistent losses. Revenue grew from prior year quarters as the Gravity SUV contributed to sales mix. Deliveries continued to increase sequentially, though the company faced ongoing challenges in achieving profitability. The company's R&D spending remained elevated as development of the midsize vehicle and robotaxi platform progressed. Operating losses narrowed somewhat compared to earlier quarters, reflecting early signs of operational leverage. However, cash burn remained a significant concern, with negative free cash flow continuing at elevated levels. Management maintained guidance for approximately 18,000 vehicles in 2025, down from earlier expectations of 18,000-20,000.
